summary: Marketing Module with Meta Ads Integration testing completed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 3 pages (Dashboard, Settings, Leads) rendering correctly with proper empty states. Meta API credentials NOT configured (expected) - OAuth flow cannot be tested. Webhook verification working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/marketing/config - Returns configuration status (meta_configured, webhook_configured, webhook_url)
Backend: GET /api/marketing/accounts - Returns empty list when no accounts connected
Backend: GET /api/marketing/dashboard - Returns dashboard metrics with all zeros when no data
Backend: GET /api/marketing/dashboard with date_preset - Supports last_7d, last_14d, last_30d filters
Backend: GET /api/marketing/leads - Returns paginated leads list with proper structure
Backend: GET /api/marketing/leads with filters - synced_to_crm and pagination work correctly
Backend: GET /api/marketing/campaigns - Returns campaigns list (empty when no accounts)
Backend: GET /api/marketing/webhook - Webhook verification with correct token returns challenge
Backend: GET /api/marketing/webhook - Verification with wrong token returns 403
Backend: GET /api/marketing/webhook - Missing params returns 403
Backend: POST /api/marketing/oauth/start - Returns proper error when Meta not configured
Backend: All marketing endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
Frontend: Marketing section icon visible on homepage (pink megaphone icon)
Frontend: Marketing Dashboard page renders with all metric cards (Total Spend, Total Leads, CPL, Impressions, Clicks, CTR)
Frontend: Dashboard shows additional metrics row (CPM, CPC, Reach, Frequency)
Frontend: 'No Meta Accounts Connected' warning displayed when no accounts
Frontend: Campaign Performance table shows empty state message
Frontend: Marketing Settings page renders with Configuration Status section
Frontend: Settings shows Meta API status (Not configured) and Webhook status (Ready)
Frontend: Webhook URL displayed with copy button
Frontend: Connect Meta Account button is correctly disabled when Meta not configured
Frontend: Setup Instructions section displayed when Meta not configured
Frontend: Connected Ad Accounts section shows '0 accounts connected'
Frontend: Marketing Leads page renders with filters (account, sync status)
Frontend: Leads page shows 'No leads found' empty state
Frontend: Navigation between Marketing pages works correctly via sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: Marketing module is well-implemented with proper API structure and frontend UI
All endpoints correctly require authentication (super_admin, admin, or marketing roles)
Dashboard shows proper empty state when no Meta accounts are connected
Settings page provides clear setup instructions and webhook URL for Meta integration
Leads page has proper pagination and filter controls
Webhook verification correctly validates verify_token from environment
OAuth start endpoint properly returns error when META_APP_ID/META_APP_SECRET not configured
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with empty state (no Meta accounts connected)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketing Module fully implemented and tested. Features include: 1) GET /api/marketing/config returns configuration status (meta_configured=false since credentials empty), 2) GET /api/marketing/accounts returns empty list, 3) GET /api/marketing/dashboard returns all zero metrics, 4) GET /api/marketing/leads returns paginated empty list, 5) GET /api/marketing/campaigns returns empty list, 6) Webhook verification endpoint works with verify token 'clt_synapse_meta_webhook_2024'. Frontend has 3 pages: Analytics Dashboard with all metric cards, Settings with configuration status and setup instructions, and Meta Ads Leads with filters and empty state. Meta OAuth cannot be tested because META_APP_ID and META_APP_SECRET environment variables are empty.

feature_verification.GET /api/marketing/config: WORKING - Returns {meta_configured: false, webhook_configured: true, webhook_url: 'https://...'}
feature_verification.GET /api/marketing/accounts: WORKING - Returns empty array when no accounts
feature_verification.GET /api/marketing/dashboard: WORKING - Returns summary with zero metrics and empty campaigns array
feature_verification.GET /api/marketing/webhook verification: WORKING - Returns challenge when token matches
feature_verification.POST /api/marketing/oauth/start: WORKING - Returns 400 'Meta Ads credentials not configured' when META_APP_ID empty
feature_verification.Marketing Dashboard page: WORKING - All metric cards (CPL, CPM, CTR, etc.) displayed
feature_verification.Marketing Settings page: WORKING - Configuration status, webhook URL, setup instructions shown
feature_verification.Marketing Leads page: WORKING - Filters, empty state, pagination controls present
feature_verification.Navigation: WORKING - Marketing section icon on homepage, sidebar navigation works

meta_integration_notes: Meta Ads OAuth integration is NOT MOCKED - it requires real META_APP_ID and META_APP_SECRET to be configured in backend/.env. Currently these are empty strings. The webhook URL for Meta App is: https://lead-pool-master.preview.emergentagent.com/api/marketing/webhook with verify token: clt_synapse_meta_webhook_2024
